question: What are the names of people who do not play poker?
gold_sql: SELECT Name FROM people WHERE People_ID NOT IN (SELECT People_ID FROM poker_player)
predicted_sql: SELECT col_2 FROM table_2 WHERE col_1 NOT IN (SELECT col_2 FROM table_1)
raw_response: SELECT col_2 FROM table_2 WHERE col_1 NOT IN (SELECT col_2 FROM table_1)
